## Le Neurone "Supermarché" (Combinaison Linéaire & ReLU)

::: {.card}
:::: {.card-header}
🎛️ Paramètres
::::
:::: {.card-body}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof trafficA = Inputs.range([0, 500], {value: 300, step: 10, label: "Trafic Zone A (x₁)"})
viewof weightA = Inputs.range([0, 3], {value: 1.5, step: 0.1, label: "Route A (w₁)"})

```

---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof trafficB = Inputs.range([0, 500], {value: 150, step: 10, label: "Trafic Zone B (x₂)"})
viewof weightB = Inputs.range([0, 3], {value: 0.5, step: 0.1, label: "Route B (w₂)"})

```

---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof bias = Inputs.range([-300, 300], {value: 100, step: 10, label: "Clients Piétons (b)"})

```

::::

:::

::: {.card}
:::: {.card-header}
🕸️ Flux de Données [Réseau & Activation]{.badge .bg-success .float-end}
::::
:::: {.card-body}

::::: {#plot-supermarket-network .plot-wrapper}
:::::

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
import { createGraph } from "../../assets/js/graph.js"

// 1. Calculs mathématiques réactifs
Z = (trafficA * weightA) + (trafficB * weightB) + bias
isActive = Z >= 500
revenus = isActive ? (Z - 500) * 50 : 0

// 2. Moteur Force Graph avec les particules de flux
renderSupermarketNetwork = {
  const nodes = [
    { id: "A", label: () => `Zone A\n(${window.simState?.trafficA ?? 300})`, fx: -160, fy: -60, status: "input", shape: "pill" },
    { id: "B", label: () => `Zone B\n(${window.simState?.trafficB ?? 150})`, fx: -160, fy: 60, status: "input", shape: "pill" },
    { id: "Bias", label: () => `Piétons\n(b = ${window.simState?.bias ?? 100})`, fx: 0, fy: -110, status: "bias", shape: "circle" },
    { id: "Neuron", label: () => `Magasin (Σ)\nZ = ${window.simState?.Z ?? 500}`, fx: 0, fy: 0, status: "neuron", shape: "rounded rect" },
    { id: "Output", label: () => `Revenus\n${window.simState?.revenus ?? 0} €`, fx: 160, fy: 0, status: () => window.simState?.isActive ? "active" : "inactive", shape: "diamond" }
  ];

  const links = [
    { source: "A", target: "Neuron", label: () => `w₁ = ${(window.simState?.weightA ?? 1.5).toFixed(1)}`, status: "flow", width: () => 1 + (window.simState?.weightA ?? 1.5) * 2.5 },
    { source: "B", target: "Neuron", label: () => `w₂ = ${(window.simState?.weightB ?? 0.5).toFixed(1)}`, status: "flow", width: () => 1 + (window.simState?.weightB ?? 0.5) * 2.5 },
    { source: "Bias", target: "Neuron", label: "Biais", status: "biasLink", width: () => 1 + Math.abs(window.simState?.bias ?? 100) / 100 },
    {
      source: "Neuron",
      target: "Output",
      label: "ReLU",
      status: () => window.simState?.isActive ? "activeFlow" : "inactiveFlow",
      width: () => window.simState?.isActive ? 2.5 + Math.min(6, (window.simState?.revenus ?? 0) / 2500) : 1,
      condition: () => {
        const active = window.simState?.isActive ?? true;
        return { value: active, label: active ? "Z ≥ 500" : "Z < 500", labelPosition: 'right'};
      }
    }
  ];

  const graph = createGraph("#plot-supermarket-network", { nodes, links }, {
    nodeRadius: 25,
    fontSize: 9,
    enableZoom: false,
    enablePan: false,
    enableDrag: false,
    zoomToFit: true,
    zoomToFitPadding: 40,
    styles: {
      input: { nodeBg: "rgba(38, 139, 210, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-blue)", nodeText: "var(--sol-blue)" },
      bias: { nodeBg: "rgba(211, 54, 130, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-magenta)", nodeText: "var(--sol-magenta)" },
      neuron: { nodeBg: "rgba(181, 137, 0, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-yellow)", nodeText: "var(--sol-yellow)" },
      active: { nodeBg: "rgba(133, 153, 0, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-green)", nodeText: "var(--sol-green)" },
      inactive: { nodeBg: "rgba(220, 50, 47, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-red)", nodeText: "var(--sol-red)" },

      flow: { linkStroke: "var(--sol-base1)", linkText: "var(--sol-base01)", particles: 3, particleColor: "var(--sol-blue)" },
      biasLink: { linkStroke: "var(--sol-magenta)", linkText: "var(--sol-magenta)", particles: 1, particleColor: "var(--sol-magenta)", particleSpeed: 0.005 },
      activeFlow: { linkStroke: "var(--sol-green)", linkText: "var(--sol-green)", particles: 5, particleColor: "var(--sol-green)", particleSpeed: 0.02 },
      inactiveFlow: { linkStroke: "var(--sol-red)", linkText: "var(--sol-red)", particles: 0 }
    }
  });

  invalidation.then(() => { if (graph && graph.destroy) graph.destroy(); });
  return graph;
}

// 3. Mise à jour dynamique de l'état sans re-création du graphe
updateState = {
  window.simState = { trafficA, trafficB, weightA, weightB, bias, Z, revenus, isActive };
  if (renderSupermarketNetwork && typeof renderSupermarketNetwork.refresh === "function") {
    renderSupermarketNetwork.refresh();
  }
  return html``;
}

```

::::

:::


## L'Apprentissage : Rétropropagation & Descente de Gradient

::: {.grid}

:::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::::: {.card .card-concept .h-100}
:::::: {.card-header}
🎯 Objectifs du Siège Social
::::::
:::::: {.card-body}

Le magasin a généré **21 250 €** aujourd'hui. Mais le siège social avait un autre objectif.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof bp_target = Inputs.range([20000, 50000], {value: 35000, step: 1000, label: "Objectif attendu (€)"})

```

---

L'écart de CA crée une "Perte" (Loss). La direction alloue un budget pour faire des travaux d'urbanisme la nuit et corriger le tir.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof bp_lr = Inputs.range([0.01, 0.2], {value: 0.05, step: 0.01, label: "Budget Travaux (Learning Rate)"})

```

::::::
:::::
::::

:::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
::::: {.card .card-concept .h-100}
:::::: {.card-header}
🔄 Mécanismes d'optimisation
::::::
:::::: {.card-body .p-0}

::::::: {.panel-tabset .mt-2 .mx-3}

#### 🔍 1. L'Audit (Rétropropagation)

L'inspecteur remonte les routes à l'envers. Il distribue la responsabilité de l'erreur proportionnellement au trafic d'origine (Règle de dérivation en chaîne).

:::::::: {#plot-backprop style="height: 300px; width: 100%;"}
::::::::

#### 🚧 2. Les Travaux (Descente de Gradient)

Les engins de chantier utilisent le "Budget Travaux" et les conclusions de l'audit pour élargir ou rétrécir les voies. Voici le nouveau réseau au matin :

:::::::: {#plot-gradient style="height: 300px; width: 100%;"}
::::::::

:::::::

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// 1. État initial (Forward)
bp_x1 = 300; bp_w1 = 1.5;
bp_x2 = 150; bp_w2 = 0.5;
bp_b = 100;
bp_CA = 21250; // CA calculé précédemment

// 2. Calculs Mathématiques (Backward)
bp_error = bp_target - bp_CA; 

// Calcul simplifié du Gradient (Responsabilité) : Erreur proportionnelle au trafic
grad_w1 = (bp_error / 5000) * (bp_x1 / 100); 
grad_w2 = (bp_error / 5000) * (bp_x2 / 100);

// 3. Mise à jour des poids (Gradient Descent)
new_w1 = bp_w1 + (bp_lr * grad_w1);
new_w2 = bp_w2 + (bp_lr * grad_w2);

// --- Rendu du Schéma 1 : Rétropropagation ---
renderBackprop = {
  const nodes = [
    { id: "A", label: `Zone A\n(Trafic: ${bp_x1})`, fx: -160, fy: -60, status: "auditInput", shape: "pill" },
    { id: "B", label: `Zone B\n(Trafic: ${bp_x2})`, fx: -160, fy: 60, status: "auditInput", shape: "pill" },
    { id: "Bias", label: `Piétons`, fx: -70, fy: -110, status: "auditBias", shape: "circle" },
    { id: "Neuron", label: `Magasin\nCA = ${bp_CA}€`, fx: 0, fy: 0, status: "auditNeuron", shape: "rounded rect" },
    { id: "Output", label: `Siège Social\nObjectif: ${bp_target}€`, fx: 170, fy: 0, status: "errorNode", shape: "square" }
  ];

  const links = [
    // L'astuce visuelle : Inverser les sources et targets pour inverser le flux des particules !
    { source: "Output", target: "Neuron", label: `Perte : ${bp_error > 0 ? '+' : ''}${bp_error} €`, status: "errorFlow" },
    { source: "Neuron", target: "A", label: `Resp. Forte (Δ: ${grad_w1.toFixed(1)})`, status: "errorFlow" },
    { source: "Neuron", target: "B", label: `Resp. Faible (Δ: ${grad_w2.toFixed(1)})`, status: "errorFlow" },
    { source: "Neuron", target: "Bias", label: "Ajust.", status: "errorFlow" }
  ];

  const graph = createGraph("#plot-backprop", { nodes, links }, {
    nodeRadius: 25, fontSize: 9, enableZoom: false, enablePan: false, enableDrag: false, zoomToFit: true, zoomToFitPadding: 40,
    styles: {
      errorNode: { nodeBg: "rgba(220, 50, 47, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-red)", nodeText: "var(--sol-red)" },
      auditNeuron: { nodeBg: "rgba(203, 75, 22, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-orange)", nodeText: "var(--sol-orange)" },
      auditInput: { nodeBg: "var(--sol-base2)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-base00)", nodeText: "var(--sol-base01)" },
      auditBias: { nodeBg: "var(--sol-base2)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-base00)", nodeText: "var(--sol-base01)" },
      // Particules rouges fluides qui remontent le graphe
      errorFlow: { linkStroke: "var(--sol-red)", linkText: "var(--sol-red)", particles: 4, particleColor: "var(--sol-red)", particleSpeed: 0.015 }
    }
  });

  invalidation.then(() => { if (graph && graph.destroy) graph.destroy(); });
  return graph;
}

// --- Rendu du Schéma 2 : Descente de Gradient ---
renderGradientDescent = {
  const nodes = [
    { id: "A", label: `Zone A`, fx: -160, fy: -60, status: "input", shape: "pill" },
    { id: "B", label: `Zone B`, fx: -160, fy: 60, status: "input", shape: "pill" },
    { id: "Bias", label: `Piétons`, fx: -70, fy: -110, status: "bias", shape: "circle" },
    { id: "Neuron", label: `Nouveau Magasin`, fx: 0, fy: 0, status: "neuron", shape: "rounded rect" },
    { id: "Output", label: `Prêt pour\nJour 2`, fx: 160, fy: 0, status: "active", shape: "diamond" }
  ];

  const links = [
    // Remise dans le bon sens (Forward), avec mise en avant des nouvelles valeurs
    { source: "A", target: "Neuron", label: `w₁ : ${bp_w1} ➔ ${new_w1.toFixed(2)}`, status: "updateFlow" },
    { source: "B", target: "Neuron", label: `w₂ : ${bp_w2} ➔ ${new_w2.toFixed(2)}`, status: "updateFlow" },
    { source: "Bias", target: "Neuron", label: "b mis à jour", status: "biasFlow" },
    { source: "Neuron", target: "Output", label: "Nouveau Potentiel", status: "activeFlow" }
  ];

  const graph = createGraph("#plot-gradient", { nodes, links }, {
    nodeRadius: 25, fontSize: 9, enableZoom: false, enablePan: false, enableDrag: false, zoomToFit: true, zoomToFitPadding: 40,
    styles: {
      input: { nodeBg: "rgba(38, 139, 210, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-blue)", nodeText: "var(--sol-blue)" },
      bias: { nodeBg: "rgba(211, 54, 130, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-magenta)", nodeText: "var(--sol-magenta)" },
      neuron: { nodeBg: "rgba(181, 137, 0, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-yellow)", nodeText: "var(--sol-yellow)" },
      active: { nodeBg: "rgba(133, 153, 0, 0.15)", nodeBorder: "var(--sol-green)", nodeText: "var(--sol-green)" },
      
      // Flux verts pour montrer la correction réussie
      updateFlow: { linkStroke: "var(--sol-green)", linkText: "var(--sol-green)", particles: 2, particleColor: "var(--sol-green)", particleWidth: 4 },
      activeFlow: { linkStroke: "var(--sol-base1)", linkText: "var(--sol-base01)", particles: 1 },
      biasFlow: { linkStroke: "var(--sol-magenta)", linkText: "var(--sol-magenta)", particles: 1 }
    }
  });

  invalidation.then(() => { if (graph && graph.destroy) graph.destroy(); });
  return graph;
}

```

:::::::

::::::
:::::
::::

:::
